message:
refactor: extract prependDictPage helper and runSql in wasm-engine

query-do.ts: extract prependDictPage() to deduplicate 24-line
dictionary page fetch+prepend logic used in both EdgeScanOperator
and QueryDO fallback Parquet path.

wasm-engine.ts: extract private runSql() to deduplicate 8-line
SQL buffer setup shared by executeQuery() and executeQueryColumnar().
